/opt/fsl-imx-x11/4.1.15-2.1.0/sysroots/x86_64-pokysdk-linux/usr/bin/arm-poky-linux-gnueabi/arm-poky-linux-gnueabi-gcc --sysroot=/opt/fsl-imx-x11/4.1.15-2.1.0/sysroots/cortexa7hf-neon-poky-linux-gnueabi -march=armv7ve -mfpu=neon -mfloat-abi=hard -mcpu=cortex-a7 -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/mqttClient.dir/mqttClient.c.o  -o bin/mqttClient   -L/home/alientek/tools/paho.mqtt.c-1.3.8/install/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alientek/tools/paho.mqtt.c-1.3.8/install/lib -lpaho-mqtt3c
